name: @c4n/ui-tokens
description: 4never Company design tokens + HUD primitives. Implements the design system shipped 2026-05-26 (Claude Design handoff): colors_and_type.css token set, self-hosted Sora/Manrope/JetBrains Mono fonts, .hud utility class with gold L-bracket corners, React TS ports of HUDFrame/Eyebrow/Btn/Badge/Input/Divider. Consumed by apps/wizard + apps/desktop.
